name: OpenFgaProviderConnection
description: OpenFGA authorization server connection supporting API token and OAuth2 client credentials authentication.

fields.name: api_token
fields.description: API token for token-based authentication. Mutually exclusive with client credentials.

fields.name: client_id
fields.description: OAuth2 client ID for client credentials authentication.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.description: OAuth2 client secret for client credentials authentication.

fields.name: api_token_issuer
fields.description: Token issuer URL for client credentials flow.

fields.name: api_audience
fields.description: OAuth2 audience for the access token. Optional.
